final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the circuit outputs 'v' based on the XOR of inputs 'x', 'y', 'z', and 'w', but in reality, it follows a more complex set of rules.
module logic_circuit (
    input x,
    input y,
    input z,
    input w,
    output reg v);assign v = x&~y&~z&w | x&y&~z&~w | x&~y&z&~w | x&y&z&w;

endmodule
